_meta.description: Safety Envelope — Physical limits for all evolvable parameters. CodeCraftSage MUST reject any proposal outside these bounds.

volume_percentile_threshold.reason: Below 50 captures noise; above 95 filters everything.

body_percentage_threshold.reason: Below 10 is a doji-only filter; above 70 includes full-body candles.

lookback_candles.reason: Must have enough history for percentile but not stale data.

atr_multiplier.reason: Below 0.5 is too tight; above 5.0 includes all noise.

volume_threshold.reason: Multiplier on global average volume. Must be positive.

min_zone_bars.reason: Minimum candles for a valid accumulation zone.

r2_min.reason: R² threshold for mini-trend. Above 0.95 is overfitting a line.

min_trend_length.reason: Minimum candles for a valid mini-trend segment.

zigzag_threshold.reason: ZigZag percentage. Too low = noise; too high = no trends.

proximity_tolerance.reason: Candle distance for spatial coincidence matching.

retest_timeout_bars.reason: Max wait for retest. Too short misses retests; too long wastes memory.

outcome_lookahead_bars.reason: Future candles to determine BOUNCE vs BREAKOUT.

n_estimators.reason: RandomForest trees. Below 10 underfits; above 500 is diminishing returns.

max_depth.reason: Tree depth. Above 20 overfits on small datasets.

min_samples_split.reason: Minimum samples to split a node.

min_confidence.reason: Oracle prediction threshold. Below 0.5 is random; above 0.99 filters everything.

retrain_interval_hours.reason: Hours between retraining. Min 1h to avoid thrashing.

max_position_size_pct.reason: Max position size as % of portfolio. Above 10% is reckless.

max_drawdown_session_pct.reason: Session drawdown limit. Below 1% triggers too often; above 20% is dangerous.

max_signals_per_hour.reason: Rate limiting. Prevents runaway signal generation.

min_signal_quality_score.reason: Minimum quality to act on a signal.

drift_threshold.reason: Minimum drift magnitude to trigger a proposal.

cooldown_seconds.reason: Seconds between proposals for the same parameter. Min 1min.
